description_long: This is a cluttered office cubicle desk setup, surrounded by three tall gray partition walls and filled with various office equipment and supplies. The desk surface is covered with stacks of paper, folders, books, and a computer monitor, keyboard, and mouse. There is a rolling office chair positioned at the main workspace, and a set of drawers and filing cabinets are integrated into the desk structure. A large water cooler with a blue water jug is placed at one end of the cubicle, with additional water jugs and scattered papers on the floor around the desk. The cubicle walls are adorned with pinned notes and documents, and a desk lamp provides localized lighting. The overall scene suggests a busy, perhaps slightly chaotic, office environment.
description: A cluttered office cubicle desk with gray partition walls, covered in papers, office supplies, and a water cooler at one end. The workspace includes drawers, a rolling chair, and scattered documents, evoking a busy office setting.
description_view_0: The back of the cubicle desk, showing the tall gray partition walls and scattered papers on the floor, with the water cooler partially visible.
description_view_1: The front of the desk, revealing the main workspace with a rolling chair, computer, lamp, stacks of papers, and a filing cabinet, as well as the water cooler to the right.
description_view_2: A side view highlighting the water cooler, extra water jug, and the cluttered desk surface with books, folders, and a chair tucked in.
description_view_3: The opposite side of the cubicle, showing the partition walls, water cooler, and some office supplies on the desk, with less detail of the workspace itself.
attribute_orientation: The user-facing side is open with a rolling chair, drawers, and workspace, while the other three sides are enclosed by tall partition walls. The water cooler is positioned at one end, indicating the front is where the chair and main workspace are accessible.
attribute_usage_context: computer workstation in a busy office cubicle
